'''√ng-z-g''' ('''kangazag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lactify|lactify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lactify|lactify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-z-g
|-
! Lemma
| kangazag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingazag || jingazag || shingazag || kingazag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungazag || jujungazag || shushungazag || kukungazag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungazag || jungazag || shungazag || kungazag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungazag || jungazag || shungazag || kungazag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengazag || jengazag || shengazag || kengazag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongazag || jojongazag || shoshongazag || kokongazag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongazag || jongazag || shongazag || kongazag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongazag || jongazag || shongazag || kongazag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag || ngazag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængazag || jængazag || shængazag || kængazag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangazag || jajangazag || shashangazag || kakangazag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangazag || jangazag || shangazag || kangazag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangazag || jangazag || shangazag || kangazag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangazag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangazag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangazag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangazagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangazagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangazagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangazagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangazagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangazagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangazagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangazagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangazagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangazagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangazagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangazagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangazagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangazagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangazagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangazagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangazagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangazagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangazagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangazagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangazagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangazagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangazagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangazagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangazagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangazagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangazagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangazagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangazagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangazagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangazagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangazagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangazagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangazagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangazagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangazagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangazagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangazagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangazagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangazagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangazagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangazagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangazagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangazagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangazagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangazagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangazagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangazagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangazagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangazagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangazagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangazagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangazagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangazagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangazagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangazagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangazagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangazagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangazagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangazagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
